name: Panthenol
description: Pro-vitamin B5 that deeply hydrates, soothes, and regenerates skin tissue with exceptional tolerability.
scientificSummary: Converted to pantothenic acid (vitamin B5) in the skin, which is essential for coenzyme A synthesis and cell metabolism.
mechanismOfAction: Absorbed into skin cells and converted to pantothenic acid, fueling cellular repair processes and increasing skin hydration.

seo.title: Panthenol - Pro-Vitamin B5 Skin Healer | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Panthenol (Pro-Vitamin B5) deeply hydrates, soothes, and accelerates skin repair.
